notes:
### v1.3.4

#### Added
- MeowConnect can now complete managed roster characters from shared LOA Logs evidence. If multiple connected rosters under the same account appear in the same uploaded raid log, matching characters can be completed as well.

#### Improved
- MeowConnect raid completion refreshes faster during normal refreshes and realtime updates, so Dashboard and To Do can update without needing to manually open the Logs tab first.
- MeowConnect Logs now explain shared clears better by grouping MeowConnect-sourced completions with LOA Logs style entries.
- Same-account roster participants in MeowConnect Logs can now be labeled by roster name when needed.

#### Fixed
- Chaos Gate and Field Boss availability now follows the event calendar correctly, including the 17-hour event window.
- Field Boss completion from the dashboard now updates To Do consistently.
- Roster-wide event task storage is more stable and prepared for character-independent completion rows.
- To Do raid gate tooltips now show confirmed clear difficulty when available, including clears filled by MeowConnect.
- Chaos Gate and Field Boss buttons no longer show an unnecessary 1/1 counter.
- Custom roster names are preserved during scraper refreshes, including newly discovered characters in an existing renamed roster.
- Roster-wide tracking settings are stored once per roster instead of once per character.

#### Technical Notes
- Added database migration v17 to rebuild `completion_status` with nullable `char_id`, clean legacy roster-wide event rows, and add stable unique handling for character-independent Ship Shop and Sea Coin rows.
- Added database migration v18 to rebuild `conf_tracking` so roster-wide task tracking rows use `char_id = NULL` and are unique by `roster_id + content_id`.
- Updated tracking and To Do matrix reads to expand nullable roster-wide tracking rows back into per-character UI state.
- Updated Tracking Settings writes and compatibility paths so roster-wide tasks no longer create per-character `conf_tracking` rows.
- Updated roster-wide Gate, Boss, Argeos, Ship Shop, and Sea Coin paths to support `char_id = NULL` storage where appropriate.
- Reworked backend Gate/Boss availability to mirror the frontend calendar and daily reset window: Gate on Monday, Thursday, Saturday, Sunday; Boss on Tuesday, Friday, Sunday; each active for 17 hours after reset.
- Updated To Do roster-event rendering so inactive Gate/Boss rows use the countdown component instead of a disabled weekly state.
- Normalized MeowConnect `meow_connect` completion source display into LOA Logs style log rows to avoid duplicate-looking source types.
- Moved MeowConnect friend clear hint application into shared snapshot services and app-level realtime refresh so completions can apply outside the Logs view.
- Expanded clear hint building to include local LOA Logs evidence, allowing connected managed roster characters found in the same encounter player list to be completed.
- Split same-account MeowConnect log participants by roster label when an encounter includes additional connected roster characters beyond the uploader's active roster.
- Updated scraper and metadata upserts to preserve existing non-empty `conf_character.roster_name`, and to inherit the current roster display name for new characters under an existing roster id.
- Updated To Do raid gate tooltip logic to show `Planned` and `Cleared` when an actual clear difficulty exists for a completed gate.
